name: Shrimp Quesadillas
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Shredded Monterey Jack cheese (4 oz)
1/2 cup Coarsely chopped cooked shrimp or imitation shrimp
1/4 cup Thinly sliced green onions and tops
1 tbsp Finely chopped cilantro or parsley
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle half of each tortilla with cheese, shrimp, onions, and cilantro.
2. Fold the tortillas into halves.
3. Place in freezer bags and freeze.
To Cook: Thaw at room temperature for 10-15 minutes. Heat in a lightly greased skillet over medium heat until golden on both sides. Cut each tortilla into 4 wedges. Serves 4.
